home.emptyHint: No photos from {{day}} in earlier years. Pick another day to look back on.

status.loadingBody: Finding your photos from this day.
status.unsupportedBody: Memories reads photos from your device library, so it runs on iOS and Android.
status.deniedBodyCanAsk: Allow access to your photos so Memories can show what you captured on this day.
status.deniedBodySettings: Enable photo access for Memories in your device settings to see your photos from this day.

settings.title: Settings
settings.memoryDayHint: Photos are grouped from the start time on a day until the end time the next morning, so late-night shots still show with the right day.
settings.remindersScheduledOne: Scheduled {{count}} morning reminder for upcoming memories.
settings.remindersScheduledOther: Scheduled {{count}} morning reminders for upcoming memories.
settings.remindersNone: No upcoming memories found in the next 30 days.
settings.remindersError: Could not update reminders. Check photo and notification access.

notification.title: On This Day 📸
notification.bodyOne: You have 1 memory from this day in past years.
notification.bodyOther: You have {{count}} memories from this day in past years.
